ChatSession.title: ChatSession
ChatSession.description: A conversation session between a user and the AI.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this session.

title.description: The title of the chat session.

messages.description: The list of messages in the session.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the session was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the session was last updated.

SessionFile.title: SessionFile
SessionFile.description: A file (image, etc.) associated with a chat session.

sessionId.description: The ID of the session this file belongs to.

data.description: The base64 encoded data of the file.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the file.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the file was created.

OrchestrationConfig.title: OrchestrationConfig
OrchestrationConfig.description: A custom configuration for AI agents used in orchestration.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this configuration.

globalContext.description: Global rules and accuracy protocol for all agents.

agents.description: The list of agents in the orchestration.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default configuration for the user.

/session_files/{fileId}.description: Collection of files associated with chat sessions.
